inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $5452.0M less capital spending $1248.0M ÷ 484.0M diluted shares per ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash after OCF recovery; reported net income trough ($1.08B) reflects commodity margin compression.

bear.notes: Crush margins stay depressed; Nutrition growth stalls; leverage limits buybacks

base.notes: Mid-cycle normalization; Ag Services crush recovery; Nutrition mix shift continues

bull.notes: Biofuels demand and South American origination drive margin expansion

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Global elevator and processing network largely on balance sheet at cost (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Forward grain and oilseed origination contracts convert through working capital

option_scan.question: Embedded option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Nutrition segment $8.0B revenue; separate nutrition_and_specialty_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Mid-cycle crush-margin recovery after FY2024 trough plus Nutrition specialty mix shift; partially offset by commodity price volatility and net debt service
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Adjusted segment operating profit stays below $2.5B for two consecutive fiscal years
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Nutrition adjusted operating profit exceeds $600M with stable intersegment controls

stance_proposal.override_reason: Net debt ~$7.4B and commodity cycle reserve cap dhando despite scale moat

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map origination/processing owner cash, Nutrition specialty option, net financial claims, and commodity-cycle/execution reserve once each.

components.label: Global origination and processing owner-cash engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ADM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260217_rpt20251231_acc0000007084_26_000011.htm: FY2025 revenue $80269.0M, OCF $5452.0M, FCF $4204.0M, cash $1015.0M, debt $8410.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 adjusted total segment operating profit
FY2025 diluted shares (weighted average)

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; trough earnings year but OCF recovered to $5.45B.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth; mid-cycle normalization after FY2024 trough.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade as crush margins normalize and Nutrition mix stabilizes.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Cyclical processor premium to cost of equity; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 7× / 9× / 11× on year-7 cash path for commodity processor.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ADM, including global origination/processing owner cash, Nutrition specialty upside, net financial claims, and commodity-cycle reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated processing engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; Nutrition option, net debt, and cycle reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity ~$24B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($8.686/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Global origination and processing owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Ag Services & Oilseeds plus Carbohydrate Solutions normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: OCF recovery year; earnings trough does not fully reflect cash generation.

component_groups.label: Human nutrition and specialty-ingredients upside option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental Nutrition specialty monetization beyond consolidated FCF
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on Nutrition mix shift.
component_groups.adjustments: Intersegment sales investigation closed Jan 2026; controls remediated Jun 2025.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that Nutrition OP exceeds $500M sustainably; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Specialty ingredients ramp over 3–5 years per segment disclosures.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Nutrition capex embedded in consolidated spending; no separate proof line.

component_groups.label: Net debt and liquidity claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate debt after cash and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked debt stack.
component_groups.adjustments: Operating cash minimum judgment for commodity working capital.

component_groups.label: Commodity cycle, controls, and execution stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Crush-margin cyclicality and prior controls remediation tail
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: net debt and commodity trough cap stance despite scale.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Global origination and processing owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
